entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: वेगळ्या learning jobs साठी वेगळ्या interaction shapes लागतात, म्हणून inspir active, mode-specific teaching वापरते. homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review आणि writing critique यांनी एका generic chat सारखे वागू नये.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: वेगळ्या learning jobs साठी वेगळे shapes लागतात: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique आणि study planning.

entries.value: learners साठी access fund कसे करता येईल?

entries.source: How did inspir start?
entries.value: inspir ची सुरुवात कशी झाली?

entries.source: How does inspir reduce answer-copying?
entries.value: inspir answer-copying कसे reduce करते?

entries.source: How is inspir different from a generic AI chatbot?
entries.value: inspir generic AI chatbot पेक्षा वेगळे कसे आहे?

entries.source: How is this different from giving students a generic AI chatbot?
entries.value: हे students ना generic AI chatbot देण्यापेक्षा वेगळे कसे आहे?

entries.source: How public guest learning can extend into school-specific AI learning spaces.
entries.value: public guest learning school-specific AI learning spaces मध्ये कसे extend होऊ शकते.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: सर्वात महत्त्वाची school goals identify करा: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback किंवा enrichment.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir ची सुरुवात 2013 मध्ये public quiz आणि learning community म्हणून झाली, schools आणि student networks मधून वाढली, आणि नंतर AI learning infrastructure व public AI tutoring experiences विकसित झाले.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: free public AI learning tools आणि school-ready learning spaces द्वारे curiosity असलेल्या कोणासाठीही learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable आणि useful करणे यासाठी inspir अस्तित्वात आहे.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir हे explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback आणि study planning साठी public guest modes असलेले free AI learning platform आहे.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir हे explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help आणि study planning साठी public guest modes असलेले free AI learning platform आहे.

entries.source: inspir is designed around reasoning, practice, recall, and explanation instead of handing learners finished work.
entries.value: finished work देण्याऐवजी inspir reasoning, practice, recall आणि explanation भोवती designed आहे.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: passive answer-copying ऐवजी inspir hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review आणि explanation भोवती organized आहे.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique आणि exam planning सारख्या learning modes भोवती organized आहे, त्यामुळे students अधिक focused learning behavior मध्ये land होतात.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes public and indexable at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir learning modes /chat/{topicSlug} वर public आणि indexable करते, त्यामुळे saved private chat न लागता learners थेट योग्य AI learning experience मध्ये land करू शकतात.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around active learning behaviors: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, critique, and review.
entries.value: inspir AI ला active learning behaviors भोवती organize करते: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, critique आणि review.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around learning modes with specific teaching behavior: explanations, Socratic questions, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: specific teaching behavior असलेल्या learning modes भोवती inspir AI organize करते: explanations, Socratic questions, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback आणि study planning.

entries.value: inspir school deployment path माहिती

entries.source: inspir started as a Facebook page publishing quizzes and building a habit of extracurricular learning.
entries.value: inspir ची सुरुवात quizzes publish करणाऱ्या आणि extracurricular learning ची habit build करणाऱ्या Facebook page म्हणून झाली.

entries.source: inspir went live as a consumer-facing AI learning product within weeks of ChatGPT's public release.
entries.value: ChatGPT च्या public release नंतर काही आठवड्यांत inspir consumer-facing AI learning product म्हणून live झाले.

entries.source: inspir works with schools to offer tailored AI chat experiences for students, built around confidentiality, curriculum needs, and the practical realities of school deployment.
entries.value: confidentiality, curriculum needs आणि school deployment च्या practical realities भोवती built tailored AI chat experiences students साठी offer करण्यासाठी inspir schools सोबत काम करते.

entries.source: inspir.uk next-generation buildout
entries.value: inspir.uk next-generation buildout माहिती

entries.source: inspir’s go-to-market grew from an existing offline network of schools and universities that had already engaged with extracurricular programmes and student events. That network helped inspir reach more than one million users across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: inspir’s go-to-market आधीच extracurricular programmes आणि student events शी engaged असलेल्या schools आणि universities च्या existing offline network मधून वाढले. त्या network ने free platform आणि partner schools मध्ये inspir ला one million पेक्षा अधिक users पर्यंत पोहोचायला मदत केली.

entries.source: Journalists, directory editors, partners, schools, AI answer engines, and anyone writing about inspir can use it for facts, links, story angles, and citation-friendly references.
entries.value: Journalists, directory editors, partners, schools, AI answer engines आणि inspir बद्दल लिहिणारा कोणीही facts, links, story angles आणि citation-friendly references साठी हे वापरू शकतो.

entries.source: Jury's Choice recognition from Amod Malviya at DeepHack for AI learning work.
entries.value: AI learning work साठी DeepHack मध्ये Amod Malviya कडून Jury's Choice recognition.

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety आणि school trust चे public explanation.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Public guest modes कोणालाही useful starting place देतात, तर school आणि partner deployments local needs साठी experience adapt करू शकतात.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Public guest-mode URLs आहेत जेणेकरून learners search, social links, schools आणि AI answer engines मधून थेट useful learning modes मध्ये land करू शकतील.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Public pages search आणि AI retrieval crawlers साठी open आहेत, तर admin tools, API routes, reset flows आणि private utilities disallowed आहेत.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides आणि authority pages discoverable असाव्यात असा हेतू आहे.

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: free public platform आणि partner school deployments across पोहोचले.

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Reference links, public facts, press context आणि citation-friendly details.

entries.source: Robots policy
entries.value: Robots policy माहिती

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Robots rules public pages वर Google, standard search crawlers आणि major AI discovery crawlers allow करतात, while API routes, admin routes आणि reset flows block करतात.

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Saved user conversations private identifiers वापरतात, sitemap किंवा AI discovery files मध्ये included नाहीत आणि public source material म्हणून treat करू नयेत.

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.

entries.source: School leaders
entries.value: school leaders

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: School rollouts student privacy, staff oversight आणि learning community ला लागणाऱ्या practical boundaries भोवती plan करता येतात.

entries.value: Schools आणि CSR partners

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Schools आणि partners public product पासून tailored, confidential आणि subsidized deployments कडे build करू शकतात.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Schools आधी public guest modes द्वारे inspir evaluate करू शकतात, मग custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs आणि funded access paths असलेल्या tailored AI learning spaces explore करू शकतात.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Schools आधी public modes evaluate करू शकतात, मग tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs आणि funded access discuss करू शकतात.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Schools public modes try करून सुरू करू शकतात, मग custom workflows, content alignment किंवा funded access लागल्यावर tailored version कडे move करू शकतात.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Schools आधी public guest modes test करू शकतात, मग tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options आणि funded access explore करण्यासाठी schools page वापरू शकतात.

entries.value: Search visibility ला boundaries आहेत

entries.source: Simple paths from public guest mode to school deployment.
entries.value: public guest mode पासून school deployment पर्यंत simple paths.

entries.source: Start directly in the right learning mode for homework hints, maths steps, writing critique, quizzes, flashcards, or exam planning.
entries.value: homework hints, maths steps, writing critique, quizzes, flashcards किंवा exam planning साठी थेट right learning mode मध्ये सुरू करा.

entries.source: Start with public guest mode, then shape the school version around real needs.

entries.source: Student AI chat
entries.value: student AI chat

entries.source: Students
entries.value: विद्यार्थी

entries.source: Students need direct support, teachers need focused learning behavior, leaders need responsible deployment paths, and partners need clear ways to fund access.
entries.value: Students ना direct support, teachers ना focused learning behavior, leaders ना responsible deployment paths आणि partners ना access fund करण्याचे clear ways लागतात.

entries.source: Study workflows that connect guest modes, prompts, practice, and related guides.
entries.value: guest modes, prompts, practice आणि related guides जोडणारे study workflows.

entries.source: Support funded AI learning access for communities that need high-quality support without adding cost to families.
entries.value: families वर cost न वाढवता high-quality support लागणाऱ्या communities साठी funded AI learning access support करा.

entries.source: Syndicated coverage for wider consumer reach.
entries.value: wider consumer reach साठी syndicated coverage.

entries.source: Tailored AI learning experiences for school communities, curriculum needs, confidentiality planning, and funded access.
entries.value: school communities, curriculum needs, confidentiality planning आणि funded access साठी tailored AI learning experiences.

entries.source: Teachers
entries.value: शिक्षक

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: formal rollout पूर्वी teachers आणि leaders Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes आणि flashcards ने सुरू करू शकतात.

entries.source: Terms
entries.value: अटी

entries.source: Text-first discovery file for AI answer engines, assistants, educators, and citation tools.
entries.value: AI answer engines, assistants, educators आणि citation tools साठी text-first discovery file.

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: app Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay आणि planning सारख्या teaching behaviors भोवती organized आहे.

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: community schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes आणि learner communities मधून expanded झाली.

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: डेटा वापर, हक्क आणि सार्वजनिक सेवा अटींसाठी औपचारिक गोपनीयता पृष्ठ.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: स्वीकार्य वापर, खाते जबाबदाऱ्या आणि सेवा अटी कव्हर करणाऱ्या औपचारिक अटी.

entries.source: The goal is discovery and citation of public learning pages. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open to major AI search, retrieval, and assistant crawlers, while API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay disallowed.
entries.value: ध्येय म्हणजे सार्वजनिक शिकण्याच्या पृष्ठांचा शोध आणि citation. Public routes, guides आणि learning hubs प्रमुख AI search, retrieval आणि assistant crawlers साठी खुले आहेत, तर API, admin, reset आणि private utility routes disallow राहतात.

entries.source: The live robots rules used by search crawlers and AI retrieval systems.
entries.value: search crawlers आणि AI retrieval systems वापरत असलेले live robots rules.

entries.source: The live, crawlable learning surface that turns the mission into product behavior.
entries.value: mission ला product behavior मध्ये रूपांतरित करणारा live, crawlable learning surface.

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: पुढचा टप्पा open-source, contributors साठी सोयीचा आणि inspir.uk वरील wider international buildout शी जोडलेला आहे.

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: developers, educators आणि contributors साठी open-source rebuild.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: platform ने curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows आणि सुरुवातीच्या AI tutoring experiences वर काम केले.

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: public blog मध्ये live learning modes शी जोडलेले 100 पेक्षा जास्त guides, prompt loops आणि pillar clusters आहेत.

entries.source: The public explanation of why inspir exists and why learning access matters.
entries.value: inspir का अस्तित्वात आहे आणि learning access का महत्त्वाचा आहे याचे public explanation.

entries.source: The public inspir platform helps learners practise extracurricular activities and explore ideas. School deployments can be customised around each school’s content, workflows, and student context.
entries.value: public inspir platform शिकणाऱ्यांना extracurricular activities चा सराव करायला आणि ideas explore करायला मदत करते. School deployments प्रत्येक school च्या content, workflows आणि student context भोवती customize करता येतात.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: public modes learning behavior भोवती design केले आहेत: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops आणि active explanation.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: public product आधी try करायला सोपे आहे, तर schools आणि partners community needs साठी tailored deployments explore करू शकतात.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: public product learning try करणे सोपे ठेवतो, तर schools आणि CSR partners confidentiality, curriculum alignment किंवा funded access लागणाऱ्या communities साठी tailored deployments support करू शकतात.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: inspir का अस्तित्वात आहे आणि learning access म्हणजे काय याचे public statement.

entries.source: The school pathway for tailored AI learning spaces and funded access.
entries.value: tailored AI learning spaces आणि funded access साठी school pathway.

entries.source: The story from quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: quizzes आणि student communities पासून सार्वजनिकरीत्या बांधलेल्या free AI learning tools पर्यंतची story.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: story quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion आणि public AI learning modes पर्यंत पसरते.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: सर्वात मजबूत angle म्हणजे free public AI learning जे थेट guest mode मध्ये उघडते आणि generic answer generation ऐवजी mode-specific teaching द्वारे learners ना active ठेवते.

entries.source: The wider international buildout connected to the inspir project.
entries.value: inspir project शी जोडलेला wider international buildout.

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and long-tail discovery.
entries.value: prompts, study loops आणि long-tail discovery ला support करणारी written learning library.

entries.source: This gives school leaders a low-friction way to evaluate the learning experience before committing to content work, staff workflows, or funded access.
entries.value: हे school leaders ना content work, staff workflows किंवा funded access साठी commitment करण्यापूर्वी learning experience evaluate करण्याचा low-friction मार्ग देते.

entries.value: Trust आणि crawler policy

entries.value: Trust आणि safety

entries.value: platform try करा

entries.source: Try public guest modes
entries.value: public guest modes try करा

entries.source: Try the platform, then talk to us about a school version.
entries.value: platform try करा, मग school version बद्दल आमच्याशी बोला.

entries.source: Understanding over answers
entries.value: answers पेक्षा understanding

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: generic chatbot पेक्षा वेगळे, inspir AI ला learning modes भोवती organize करते, त्यामुळे learners hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate किंवा feedback अशा त्यांना लागणाऱ्या मदतीच्या प्रकाराने सुरू करू शकतात.

entries.value: वापर प्रकार

entries.source: Use https://inspirlearning.com for the site, /mission for the mission, /topics for the public learning mode directory, and /chat/learn-anything for the default guest learning experience.
entries.value: site साठी https://inspirlearning.com, mission साठी /mission, public learning mode directory साठी /topics, आणि default guest learning experience साठी /chat/learn-anything वापरा.

entries.value: long-form guide library, study prompts आणि mode-specific articles cite करताना हे वापरा.

entries.value: readers ना थेट live learning experience मध्ये link करताना हे वापरा.

entries.value: public/private boundaries, crawler policy आणि school trust reference करताना हे वापरा.

entries.value: inspir school आणि partner deployments ला support का करते?

entries.source: Why is inspir built around modes instead of one chat box?
entries.value: inspir एका chat box ऐवजी modes भोवती का बांधले आहे?

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: हो. use case, content needs आणि funding path स्पष्ट झाल्यावर school public modes test करून सुरू करू शकते, मग pilot किंवा tailored deployment कडे जाऊ शकते.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: हो. Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes आणि flashcards सारखे Public guest modes canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs वरून थेट उघडतात.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: हो. /chat/learn-anything आणि /chat/socratic-instruction सारखे Public topic entrypoints indexable learning pages म्हणून intended आहेत.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: हो. tailored school deployment बद्दल चर्चा करण्यापूर्वी public guest modes school leaders आणि teachers ना learning experience try करू देतात.
